5 Step Process For UK Visas.

Posted by Move Up on 11 May 2014 in UK Visa Solutions.

This ContactTP page has been designed to clarify how the visa process operates in South Africa. There is currently (2014) a lot of information that the UK government assume travellers (specifically first time travellers) will take into consideration.

We trust you find this information helpful. Our core business model operates on the foundation that this website currently offers. Having someone in the industry clarify how the process operates makes the travel experience that much easier.

Move Up is here to make the travel experience convenient and easier. Those clients looking for an efficient travel experience can definitely contact Move Up for their industry leading travel solution.

(Continue Reading)

UK Visas Applications. Lodged in South Africa.

Posted by Move Up on 28 April 2014 in UK Visa Solutions.

This ContactTP page has been designed to clarify how the visa process operates in South Africa. There is currently (2014) a lot of information that the UK government assume travellers (specifically first time travellers) will take into consideration.

We trust you find this information helpful. Our core business model operates on the foundation that this website currently offers. Having someone in the industry clarify how the process operates makes the travel experience that much easier.

Move Up is here to make the travel experience convenient and easier. Those clients looking for an efficient travel experience can definitely contact Move Up for their industry leading travel solution.

For applications lodged in South Africa

About Us

Move Up defined

Passionate about helping fellow South Africans. Move Up currently specialises only in UK legislation. One of the very few companies in the country that handles all types of UK visas. Industry leaders who adopt a continual improvement strategy to the UK travelling market place.
